datasets.label: S&P Composite / S&P 500 long-history proxy
datasets.sourceName: Robert J. Shiller, Irrational Exuberance online data
datasets.notes: Uses the Data sheet Total Return Price column. Pre-1957 observations are a long-history U.S. equity market proxy, not the literal modern S&P 500.

datasets.label: S&P 500 recent price-return check
datasets.notes: Kept as an audit/source comparison file. FRED notes that the SP500 series contains 10 years of daily history and S&P reproduction restrictions.
